statistics/harmonic_mean.name: harmonic_mean
statistics/harmonic_mean.description: Return the harmonic mean of data, a sequence or iterable of real-valued numbers. If weights is omitted or None, then equal weighting is assumed. The harmonic mean is the reciprocal of the arithmetic mean() of the reciprocals of the data. For example, the harmonic mean of three values a, b and c will be equivalent to 3/(1/a + 1/b + 1/c). If one of the values is zero, the result will be zero. The harmonic mean is a type of average, a measure of the central location of the data. It is often appr...
